column1: ## EXTINCTION = 0 so that all TOTAL_LINEAGES stopped lineages are EXTANT
## (clean, exact control of extant-tip count; avoids failed-tree retries at large N).
## STOPPING_RULE = 1 -> stop when TOTAL_LINEAGES extant lineages are alive.
## TOTAL_LINEAGES is templated per benchmark size (__NTIPS__).
## SEED : If 0, the SEED is chosen randomly
